messages.message:
hi
嗨

Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
嗨，
感谢您的联系。
为了帮您推荐合适的普拉提 reformer，您能告诉我们：
 您是为工作室、健身房或转售业务购买吗？
 你计划购买多少台？
 机器将运往哪个市场/国家？
hi

Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元

Great — that helps a lot 

For a new studio setup, it really depends on the style and positioning you're going for.

Most studio owners usually choose between:

太好了——这很有帮助 

对于新的工作室设置，这真的取决于你追求的风格和位置。

大多数工作室所有者通常在以下两者之间选择：
Aluminum reformers (more modern, commercial use)
Wooden reformers (more classic, warmer look)

Are you leaning more toward aluminum or wood?

Also, how many units are you roughly planning for your studio?
I can recommend a few setups that fit your space and positioning.

你更倾向于铝材还是木材？

另外，你大致计划为你的工作室购买多少个单位？

我可以推荐几个适合你的空间和摆放位置的设计方案。

where are you located?
你在哪里？

We’re based in China, with most of our equipment produced and assembled here.

At the same time, we work with studio owners and distributors in North America, Europe, and Australia, so we’re quite familiar with studio setups and delivery requirements in your market.
我们位于中国，大部分设备都在这里生产和组装。

同时，我们与北美洲、欧洲和澳大利亚的录音棚所有者和分销商合作，因此我们对你们市场的录音棚设置和交付要求非常熟悉。

how long the shipping once the order has been made
下单后多久发货

Good question — timing is really important for a new studio setup.

Typically:

问得好——对于新工作室的搭建，时间确实非常重要。

通常：
Production time: around 10–15 days (depending on the model and quantity)
生产时间：约 10-15 天（根据型号和数量而定）
Shipping to Canada: about 35-45 days (door-to-door)
运往加拿大：大约 35-45 天（门到门）

So in total, you can expect roughly 6–9weeks from order to delivery.

If you already have a target opening timeline, I can help you plan the setup to match it.

所以总而言之，从下单到交付，你可以预期大约 6-9 周的时间。

如果你已经有了目标的开业时间表，我可以帮助你规划设置以匹配它。

6 reformer pilates machine
6 台改革式普拉提机
do you accept credit card payment?
where are you located?

We’re based in China, with most of our equipment produced and assembled here.

At the same time, we work with studio owners and distributors in North America, Europe, and Australia, so we’re quite familiar with studio setups and delivery requirements in your market.
how long the shipping once the order has been made

Yes, we can accept credit card payments 

For most studio orders, clients usually choose bank transfer, as it’s more cost-effective for larger amounts, but we can support both options depending on your preference.
For 6 reformers, I can suggest a setup that works really well for new studios — both in terms of look and long-term use.

Would you prefer a more modern aluminum style or a classic wooden style?
I can recommend the right model and give you a full quote accordingly.
您更喜欢现代的铝合金风格还是经典的木质风格？
我可以为您推荐合适的型号，并据此提供完整报价。
alumininum style

For your setup (6 units), I’d recommend this option:

对于您的配置（6 个单元），我推荐这个选项：

AR011 (premium studio model)
AR011（高级工作室型号）
– Modern aluminum frame
– Smooth carriage and higher-end finish
– Very commonly used for boutique studio setups

Price: USD 1207 per unit (for 1–9 units)

Great — aluminum is the most popular choice for new studios 
太好了——铝是新建工作室最受欢迎的选择

donyou have something more professional
你有什么更专业的选择

i mean with more exercise more complexe more professional
我的意思是更多锻炼，更复杂，更专业

Both are quite different in training style and positioning, so I want to recommend the right one for your studio.
两者在训练风格和定位上差异很大，因此我想为你工作室推荐最合适的一个。

Are you looking for:

您是在寻找：

A more advanced Pilates setup (Reformer with Tower / Cadillac)
一个更高级的普拉提设置（带塔/凯迪拉克的改革器）
→ more exercise variety, more professional studio use

or

→ 更多运动多样性，更多专业工作室使用

还是

A Megaformer-style machine (high-intensity training, more complex workouts)
一台类似 Megaformer 的机器（高强度训练，更复杂的锻炼）

Got it — just to make sure I understand you correctly 
明白了——只是要确保我正确理解你的意思
For a 6-unit studio setup, these are the best choices:

Great — then I’ll show you the most suitable professional options 
太好了——那么我将为你展示最适合的专业选项

PR012 (higher-end option)
PR012（高端选项）
– More advanced structure and finish
– For studios aiming at a more premium feel

PR012 (higher-end option)
– More advanced structure and finish
– For studios aiming at a more premium feel

PR007 (most recommended)
PR007（最推荐）
– Reformer with tower (half Cadillac)
– Excellent exercise variety
– Very popular for studio setups
 USD 1572 / unit
– 带塔式改革者（半凯迪拉克）
– 练习种类丰富
– 非常适合工作室设置
 美元 1572/单位

PR007 (most recommended)  
– Reformer with tower (half Cadillac)
– Excellent exercise variety
– Very popular for studio setups
 USD 1572 / unit

pr 007 9432$ us is the best price you can make for me?
pr 007 9432$ us 是我能做出的最佳价格吗？

PC006(full professional system)
PC006(完整专业系统)
– Maximum exercise possibilities
– Full Cadillac-level functionality
– 最大的运动可能性
– 完全的凯迪拉克级功能
For 6 units, this is the most competitive level we can offer.

PR007 is one of our higher-end studio models, especially with the tower system, so the pricing mainly reflects the structure, smooth performance, and long-term commercial use.
PR007 是我们高端工作室系列中的一款，特别是配合塔式系统使用时，其价格主要反映了结构、流畅性能以及长期商业使用的价值。

That’s already our best price for this configuration 
那是我们对此配置的最佳价格
thats includes shipping?

PR004  
– Aluminum reformer with tower
– Simpler structure, still suitable for studio use
– More budget-friendly
– 带塔的铝制 reformer
– 结构更简单，仍然适合工作室使用
– 更经济实惠
If you’re looking for a more cost-effective aluminum option, we do have another model:

you ship to my adress or i have to pick it up in a warehouse?
你们寄到我的地址还是我需要去仓库取货？

The price I shared is for the machines only (EXW), not including shipping.
我分享的价格仅指机器本身（EXW），不包括运费。

For Canada, we usually arrange door-to-door delivery (DDP), which includes:
– international shipping
– customs clearance
– duties & taxes
– delivery directly to your address

So you don’t need to pick it up — everything will be delivered to your location

If you can share your postal code, I can calculate the full landed cost for all 6 units.
如果你能提供你的邮政编码，我可以计算所有 6 个单元的完整到岸成本。
h7w0k1
Thanks — I’ve got your postal code

I’m now checking the most accurate door-to-door shipping cost for your address, so I can give you the full landed price for all 6 units.

It usually takes a little time to confirm the exact rate, but I’ll update you shortly.

In the meantime, I’ll also prepare the order details so we can move quickly once everything is confirmed 
与此同时，我也会准备订单详情，一旦确认所有信息，我们就能迅速行动

By the way, here are a couple of closer videos of the PR007 
顺便说一下，这里有一些 PR007 的更近的视频

Let me know what you think. I’ll update you shortly with the full delivered price.
告诉我你的想法。我很快会更新你完整的交付价格。

Great — here is the shipping cost for your order 
太好了——这是您订单的运费

For PR007 × 6 units to your address (H7W 0K1):

PR007 × 6 件运送到您的地址（H7W 0K1）：

Total DDP shipping cost: USD 2176
总 DDP 运费：2176 美元

This includes:
– international shipping
– customs clearance
– duties & taxes
– delivery directly to your address

Estimated time: around 45 days after shipment

So everything will be delivered directly to your studio — no need for pickup 

这包括：

– 国际运输

– 清关

– 关税和税收

– 直接配送到您的地址

预计时间：发货后约 45 天

所以所有东西将直接送到您的工作室——无需自取

Would you prefer a more modern aluminum style or a classic wooden style?
I can recommend the right model and give you a full quote accordingly.
Great — aluminum is the most popular choice for new studios
i mean with more exercise more complexe more professional
Got it — just to make sure I understand you correctly
Great — then I’ll show you the most suitable professional options
pr 007 9432$ us is the best price you can make for me?
That’s already our best price for this configuration
PR007 is one of our higher-end studio models, especially with the tower system, so the pricing mainly reflects the structure, smooth performance, and long-term commercial use.
In the meantime, I’ll also prepare the order details so we can move quickly once everything is confirmed
Great — here is the shipping cost for your order

Hi, just checking in gently on the PR007 setup for your studio.
嗨，只是温和地询问一下你工作室的 PR007 设置情况。

I know you may need a little time to review the full cost and shipping details. If PR007 is still the direction you want to go with, I can prepare everything clearly for you, including the full order summary for the next step.

If you’re still comparing options, I can also help you narrow it down in the simplest way.
如果你还在比较选项，我也可以以最简单的方式帮助你缩小范围。
If you’re still comparing options, I can also help you narrow it down in the simplest way.

last_customer_message: pr 007 9432$ us is the best price you can make for me?
last_my_message: If you’re still comparing options, I can also help you narrow it down in the simplest way.

In the meantime, I’ll also prepare the order details so we can move quickly once everything is confirmed
Great — here is the shipping cost for your order

Hi, just checking in gently on the PR007 setup for your studio.
嗨，只是温和地询问一下你工作室的 PR007 设置情况。

I know you may need a little time to review the full cost and shipping details. If PR007 is still the direction you want to go with, I can prepare everything clearly for you, including the full order summary for the next step.

If you’re still comparing options, I can also help you narrow it down in the simplest way.
如果你还在比较选项，我也可以以最简单的方式帮助你缩小范围。

seller_only_text:
Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
嗨，
感谢您的联系。
为了帮您推荐合适的普拉提 reformer，您能告诉我们：
 您是为工作室、健身房或转售业务购买吗？
 你计划购买多少台？
 机器将运往哪个市场/国家？
Hi, this is Johnny from Hesure Pilates.

We were in touch before about Pilates equipment, and I just wanted to reconnect and see whether you’re still exploring options for your business.

We’ve been working with studio owners, distributors, and equipment resellers on reformer setups recently, so I thought it might be a good time to check back with you.

If you’re still interested, I can help recommend suitable options based on your current plan.

Are you looking mainly for:

你好，我是 Hesure Pilates 的 Johnny。

之前我们曾就普拉提设备有过联系，我想重新联系一下，看看你是否还在为你的商业寻找方案。

最近我们一直在与工作室经营者、分销商和设备经销商合作进行改革器设备的设置，所以我认为现在是回访你的好时机。

如果你仍然感兴趣，我可以根据你目前的计划帮你推荐合适的方案。

您主要是在寻找：
studio setup
工作室设置
resale / distribution
转售/分销
adding a few units to an existing business
为现有企业增加几个单元
Great — that helps a lot 

For a new studio setup, it really depends on the style and positioning you're going for.

Most studio owners usually choose between:

太好了——这很有帮助 

对于新的工作室设置，这真的取决于你追求的风格和位置。

大多数工作室所有者通常在以下两者之间选择：
Aluminum reformers (more modern, commercial use)
Wooden reformers (more classic, warmer look)

Are you leaning more toward aluminum or wood?

Also, how many units are you roughly planning for your studio?
I can recommend a few setups that fit your space and positioning.

你更倾向于铝材还是木材？

另外，你大致计划为你的工作室购买多少个单位？

我可以推荐几个适合你的空间和摆放位置的设计方案。
We’re based in China, with most of our equipment produced and assembled here.

At the same time, we work with studio owners and distributors in North America, Europe, and Australia, so we’re quite familiar with studio setups and delivery requirements in your market.
我们位于中国，大部分设备都在这里生产和组装。

同时，我们与北美洲、欧洲和澳大利亚的录音棚所有者和分销商合作，因此我们对你们市场的录音棚设置和交付要求非常熟悉。
Good question — timing is really important for a new studio setup.

Typically:

问得好——对于新工作室的搭建，时间确实非常重要。

通常：
Production time: around 10–15 days (depending on the model and quantity)
生产时间：约 10-15 天（根据型号和数量而定）
Shipping to Canada: about 35-45 days (door-to-door)
运往加拿大：大约 35-45 天（门到门）

So in total, you can expect roughly 6–9weeks from order to delivery.

If you already have a target opening timeline, I can help you plan the setup to match it.

所以总而言之，从下单到交付，你可以预期大约 6-9 周的时间。

如果你已经有了目标的开业时间表，我可以帮助你规划设置以匹配它。
We’re based in China, with most of our equipment produced and assembled here.

At the same time, we work with studio owners and distributors in North America, Europe, and Australia, so we’re quite familiar with studio setups and delivery requirements in your market.
Yes, we can accept credit card payments 

For most studio orders, clients usually choose bank transfer, as it’s more cost-effective for larger amounts, but we can support both options depending on your preference.
For 6 reformers, I can suggest a setup that works really well for new studios — both in terms of look and long-term use.
Would you prefer a more modern aluminum style or a classic wooden style?
I can recommend the right model and give you a full quote accordingly.
您更喜欢现代的铝合金风格还是经典的木质风格？
我可以为您推荐合适的型号，并据此提供完整报价。
For your setup (6 units), I’d recommend this option:

对于您的配置（6 个单元），我推荐这个选项：

AR011 (premium studio model)
AR011（高级工作室型号）
– Modern aluminum frame
– Smooth carriage and higher-end finish
– Very commonly used for boutique studio setups

Price: USD 1207 per unit (for 1–9 units)
Great — aluminum is the most popular choice for new studios 
太好了——铝是新建工作室最受欢迎的选择
Both are quite different in training style and positioning, so I want to recommend the right one for your studio.
两者在训练风格和定位上差异很大，因此我想为你工作室推荐最合适的一个。
Are you looking for:

您是在寻找：

A more advanced Pilates setup (Reformer with Tower / Cadillac)
一个更高级的普拉提设置（带塔/凯迪拉克的改革器）
→ more exercise variety, more professional studio use

or

→ 更多运动多样性，更多专业工作室使用

还是

A Megaformer-style machine (high-intensity training, more complex workouts)
一台类似 Megaformer 的机器（高强度训练，更复杂的锻炼）
Got it — just to make sure I understand you correctly 
明白了——只是要确保我正确理解你的意思
For a 6-unit studio setup, these are the best choices:
Great — then I’ll show you the most suitable professional options 
太好了——那么我将为你展示最适合的专业选项
PR012 (higher-end option)
PR012（高端选项）
– More advanced structure and finish
– For studios aiming at a more premium feel
PR012 (higher-end option)
– More advanced structure and finish
– For studios aiming at a more premium feel
PR007 (most recommended)
PR007（最推荐）
– Reformer with tower (half Cadillac)
– Excellent exercise variety
– Very popular for studio setups
 USD 1572 / unit
– 带塔式改革者（半凯迪拉克）
– 练习种类丰富
– 非常适合工作室设置
 美元 1572/单位
PR007 (most recommended)  
– Reformer with tower (half Cadillac)
– Excellent exercise variety
– Very popular for studio setups
 USD 1572 / unit
PC006(full professional system)
PC006(完整专业系统)
– Maximum exercise possibilities
– Full Cadillac-level functionality
– 最大的运动可能性
– 完全的凯迪拉克级功能
For 6 units, this is the most competitive level we can offer.
PR007 is one of our higher-end studio models, especially with the tower system, so the pricing mainly reflects the structure, smooth performance, and long-term commercial use.
PR007 是我们高端工作室系列中的一款，特别是配合塔式系统使用时，其价格主要反映了结构、流畅性能以及长期商业使用的价值。
That’s already our best price for this configuration 
那是我们对此配置的最佳价格
PR004  
– Aluminum reformer with tower
– Simpler structure, still suitable for studio use
– More budget-friendly
– 带塔的铝制 reformer
– 结构更简单，仍然适合工作室使用
– 更经济实惠
If you’re looking for a more cost-effective aluminum option, we do have another model:
The price I shared is for the machines only (EXW), not including shipping.
我分享的价格仅指机器本身（EXW），不包括运费。
For Canada, we usually arrange door-to-door delivery (DDP), which includes:
– international shipping
– customs clearance
– duties & taxes
– delivery directly to your address

So you don’t need to pick it up — everything will be delivered to your location
If you can share your postal code, I can calculate the full landed cost for all 6 units.
如果你能提供你的邮政编码，我可以计算所有 6 个单元的完整到岸成本。
Thanks — I’ve got your postal code
I’m now checking the most accurate door-to-door shipping cost for your address, so I can give you the full landed price for all 6 units.

It usually takes a little time to confirm the exact rate, but I’ll update you shortly.
In the meantime, I’ll also prepare the order details so we can move quickly once everything is confirmed 
与此同时，我也会准备订单详情，一旦确认所有信息，我们就能迅速行动
By the way, here are a couple of closer videos of the PR007 
顺便说一下，这里有一些 PR007 的更近的视频
Let me know what you think. I’ll update you shortly with the full delivered price.
告诉我你的想法。我很快会更新你完整的交付价格。
Great — here is the shipping cost for your order
